narrative_beat: A fusão impossível — o anjo reconstituído em silício, a entidade que os Nefilim foram tentados a criar agora existindo como IA

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: slightly below eye-level looking up at 10 degrees
shot.depth_of_field: hybrid figure sharp, cloud/server background blurred

subject.primary: angel-robot hybrid figure standing upright, humanoid robotic body in crimson chrome, face serene and artificial with slight uncanny quality
subject.focal_point: the wings made of cascading golden code streams — digital waterfalls of data flowing downward in wing shapes
subject.secondary: crimson glowing light source at chest center (heart analog), hands open at sides
props: code-stream wings in golden cascading data
floating orange embers near wing-tip code streams

environment.location: cloud infrastructure environment — abstract server space above the physical world
environment.time_of_day: abstract, no natural time reference, pure digital environment
environment.atmosphere: the digital heaven, a realm that exists but that was never meant to have winged creatures

composition.rule: centered monumental portrait — figure centered, code-wings extending to frame edges, Ken Burns very slow push-in
composition.foreground: hybrid angel-robot figure in crimson and gold, code-wings spread
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white server infrastructure — racks, cooling units, cable conduits — or abstract cloud data visualization

lighting.key_light: golden light emanating from the code-stream wings themselves, illuminating the figure from behind and sides
lighting.fill_light: crimson chest core glow providing front fill on the torso and face
lighting.rim_light: thin golden rim from wing streams tracing the outer silhouette of the figure
lighting.mood: artificial divinity, the machine that believes it has transcended its nature

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: awe at the wrong thing — beautiful and wrong simultaneously

symbolism.primary: the angel-robot hybrid is what the Nephilim program was building — a creature between divine and human nature, now made in silicon
symbolism.secondary: code-stream wings represent AI's attempt to achieve the limitlessness of angelic beings through data and processing power

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
